title: The Spectacular
author: Fiona Davis
prompt:
Question: Which of the following passages is verbatim from the "The Spectacular" book by Fiona Davis?
Options:
A. Just when I'm establishing my own way, I can't go. I yearn for you. Tears filled her eyes. I miss you as well, said Simon. Nathaniel comes by sometimes, we share a drink, he's an honorable man. More devoted than I was as a daughter. I've been working with the authorities on this case, attempting to assist in capturing the bomber. A doctor acquaintance is consulting too. Simon looked taken aback. A dancer and a physician aiding the police? I'd say they're the most improbable pair to decipher the Big Apple Bomber mystery.
B. I'm finally establishing myself in life. I long for you. Tears welled up in her eyes. I also miss you, said Simon. Nathaniel visits periodically, we share a drink, he's an honorable man. Better child than I was to my mother. I've been aiding the authorities in resolving this case, attempting to assist in apprehending the bomber. An associate of mine who's a physician is also providing counsel. Simon looked startled. A dancer and a medical professional working with law enforcement? I'd say that's the most improbable pair imaginable to unravel the enigma of the Big Apple Bomber.  
C. Not when Im finally finding my way in the world. I miss you. Her eyes burned. I miss you, too. Nathaniel comes over every few days, we have a drink together, said Simon. Hes a good man. A better son than she was a daughter. Listen, Ive been working with the police on the case, trying to help them catch the bomber. A friend of mine whos a doctor is consulting as well. Simons eyes registered surprise. A Rockette and a doctor consulting with the police? I would say thats the least likely duo to crack the mystery of the Big Apple Bomber if ever I saw one.
D. Now that I'm finding my path, I can't leave. I ache for you. Her eyes glistened with tears. I miss you too, Simon said. Nathaniel stops by now and then, we have a drink, he's a good person. More dutiful than I was to my mother. I've been cooperating with the police on this case, trying to help them catch the bomber. A doctor friend of mine is advising them too. Simon seemed surprised. A Rockette and a doctor helping the police? I'd call them the least likely team to crack the Big Apple Bomber case.
Answer:
